About GC Collective

Your brand is your
first impression.
Make it count.

100,000+ songs uploaded to Spotify every single day

In a world where over 100,000 songs hit Spotify every 24 hours, the difference between being heard and being skipped isn't always the music — it's the visual. Listeners make a decision in seconds. Your cover art, your logo, your brand presence — that's what stops the scroll. That's what creates the moment before the first note even plays.

GC Collective works with everyone from independent artists building from the ground up to major label acts performing on national stages. We've designed on-stage screens for arena tours, built brands for multi-platinum artists, created visuals for Amazon Music and BET, and produced content for top-rated podcasts and YouTube channels with millions of views.

We don't just make things look good. We build the full visual identity — from your logo to your merch, from your tour graphics to your digital billboard. When you step in front of your audience, every element — the motion cover on your single, the thumbnail that drives your YouTube clicks, the flyer that fills the venue — should tell the same story. Your story. Built to convert, built to last.

Whether you're an artist launching your first project or an established name leveling up your brand, GC Collective delivers the visuals that make sure your audience doesn't just hear you — they remember you.
